label: HTTP POST
description: Generic authenticated HTTP POST — sends upstream stdout as the request body

executor.fn: async ({ fields, prev, log }) => { if (!fields.url) throw new Error('URL is required'); const headers = { 'Content-Type': fields.content_type }; if (fields.token) headers['Authorization'] = 'Bearer ' + fields.token; log(fields.url); const res = await fetch(fields.url, { method: 'POST', headers, body: prev }); const body = await res.text(); log('← ' + res.status + ' ' + res.statusText); if (!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status + ': ' + body.slice(0, 200)); return body; }
